sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14054" key="a)potilmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-τιλμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n14054.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tearing away,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.71</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
